meta.title: #BeADeepLearner like Lei Xu with DeepLearning.AI
meta.description:
“The Deep Learning Specialization gave me the confidence to take a chance and build a machine learning platform to solve MLOps problems. I built the entire team from scratch, and all the AI models my company uses are managed using the platform. I developed using the skills I acquired in the Specialization.” 

Looking to grow your skills and build a career in AI? Join 1 million+ learners and #BeADeepLearner with the Deep Learning Specialization, a foundational online program by machine learning pioneer Andrew Ng. Read how learners like Lei and others took the next step in their AI journey: https://www.deeplearning.ai/program/deep-learning-specialization/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=dls-jan21&course_id=dls-2
